filters.note: null_stmt_code is the code for empty-string '' loaded from indexes/stmt_codes.bin; if no empty-string entry exists, sentinel -99 means accept all rows

data_structures.aggregation: direct_array[256][256] per thread — indexed by (uint8_t)stmt_code and (uint8_t)rfile_code; holds cnt(int64), sum_line(int64), row_count(int64)
data_structures.distinct_adsh: bitset(86135) per group per thread — 7 groups × 64 threads × ~10.6KB = ~4.7MB total; OR-merged at reduction step
data_structures.dict_maps: flat array string[256] for stmt_strings and rfile_strings built from indexes/stmt_codes.bin and indexes/rfile_codes.bin at startup

parallelism.per_thread_state: independent direct_array[256][256] accumulators + bitset[7] for distinct adsh
parallelism.reduction: sequential merge of thread-local arrays: sum cnt/sum_line, bitwise-OR bitsets

indexes.purpose: load null_stmt_code for filter + build code->string inverse map for output decode
build code->string inverse map for output decode

output.sort_strategy: std::sort on 14-element result vector — trivial cost
